encryptionTab.intro: Column encryption at rest. Choose a provider and manage its master key. Envelope encryption wraps a per-column data key with the master key.
encryptionTab.restartWarning: {{note}} Rotating a master key while encrypted data exists may make prior rows unreadable — rotate before storing sensitive data, or plan a re-encryption.
encryptionTab.keyGeneratedStored: Master key generated and stored in the OS keychain (key id: {{keyId}}).
encryptionTab.keyGeneratedNoKeychain: No OS keychain available — copy this key and set it as {{envVar}}. It will not be shown again.
encryptionTab.savedRestartRequired: Saved. Restart the service to apply.
